name: BinaryFilterExpressionItem
summary: The BinaryFilterExpressionItem class represents a data item in a BinaryFilterExpressionCollection. This class cannot be inherited.

constructors.name: BinaryFilterExpressionItem
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the BinaryFilterExpressionItem class.

throws.when: Thrown when an invalid filter expression is specified.
Thrown when a null filter expression is specified.

constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the BinaryFilterExpressionItem class.

params.doc: The operator type to be used against the next item.

throws.when: Thrown when a null filter expression is specified.
